title: Hide content from hidden field from unauthorized users in Board's and Item's Activity Log

posts.author: Bladepianist (Bright RYMER)
posts.cookedHtml:
Greetings.

As stated in the title of this request, I would like to ask you to please filter out content, which is not supposed to be access to a specific-user, from the board activity log.

Please see following screenshot:

  • On the right, column’s permission, restricted to a specific group
    • On the left, board’s activity log seen from a standard user, not in the specified group on the right

image1467×802 132 KB

User on the left (again: not an admin, and not in the shown group) cannot see the “Note pour Revue” field (this is good) but can see the content of it by:

  1. reading in the board’s activity log
  2. reading in the item activity’s log as well

This behavior renders this functionality to hide field from specific people / groups… useless as is. Why, then, bother to even hide fields from others .

Maybe it’s a feature on Enterprise plan only ? But then again, above-comment applies.

Thank for reading me and hope this is addressed soon.

Kind regards.
